title: Stakeholder Update Brief
shortDescription: Generate a concise executive update with progress, blockers, and next steps.

inputs.label: Audience
inputs.example: VP of Product and Engineering leadership

inputs.label: Key Accomplishments
inputs.example: Shipped real-time collaboration on slides, closed 3 enterprise design pilots, reduced load time by 40%

inputs.label: Blockers & Risks
inputs.example: Hiring freeze delayed frontend hire, performance regression on large decks (50+ slides)

inputs.label: Upcoming Priorities
inputs.example: Presenter mode beta launch, enterprise SSO integration, design system templates
